title: Fix test_review_with_needs_changes_verdict_blocks_and_requires_followup assertion
description:
tests/test_scheduler_finalize.py::SchedulerFinalizeTests::test_review_with_needs_changes_verdict_blocks_and_requires_followup fails because the reactive scheduler (introduced in feature/b-ff6a7e64) dispatches corrective beads in the same run_once() call. The test asserts assertEqual([bead.bead_id], result.blocked) but the actual result includes the corrective bead too: ['B-xxx', 'B-xxx-corrective'].

Fix: change the assertion on line 163 in tests/test_scheduler_finalize.py to use assertIn(bead.bead_id, result.blocked) instead of assertEqual([bead.bead_id], result.blocked). This is the same fix applied to test_scheduler_followups.py in bead B-e0e74a2e.

Only change tests/test_scheduler_finalize.py. Do not change any other files.
